{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Tahirano Shrine | native_name = 平神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Tahirano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.206451|129.289032}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Tahirano Shrine | native_name = 平神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Tahirano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.206451|129.289032}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Tahirano Shrine'''|平神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].
== instance of (P31) ==
